notes: All-drawer. No doors. 2 equal drawers.
All-drawer. Standard stack. Most common base type.
All-drawer. 4-equal or bank stack.
Less common. Pencil drawer + 4.
Single door. Adjustable shelf inside.
Double door. Adjustable shelf. Standard base.
Door below + drawer above. Very common.
Double door + drawer above.
No doors. Finished interior auto-required. Add drawers freely (B-OPEN-1DR etc.) — just set drawer_count.
Open shelf below + 1 drawer above. Finished interior required.
Open shelf below + 2 drawers above. Finished interior required.
90° blind corner. Cabinet runs past the corner, blind strip covers gap. Standard door offset to one side. Standard hinges.
45° angled face frame. Door opens on the diagonal. Specialty angled door (buyout or shop-built). Requires special hinges for angled frame.
Rotating shelves. Full-circle or kidney. 2 doors, standard hinges. Hardware-heavy.
Sink cutout. No real drawer (false front implied).
Sink cutout. False front on drawer space implied.
Trash pullout hardware. 1-door with pullout.
Single door wall cabinet. Most common upper.
Double door wall cabinet.
Taller upper with 2 adjustable shelves.
Taller upper with 2 adjustable shelves.
No doors. Finished interior required. Display shelf.
90° blind corner upper. Standard door offset. Standard hinges. Blind strip fills gap.
45° angled upper. Diagonal door. Specialty hinges. Less common than base 45° but same logic.
Full-height pantry. Many shelves. Double door.
Built-in oven. Custom heights. Specialty labor.
Panels + top box. No real door or drawer.
1 or 2 doors. Utility storage.
1.5in finished panel. Left or right. Minimal labor.
3/4in end or refer panel. Applied to cabinet side.
Large back panel. Material-heavy
Full sheet applied wall panel.
Custom structural panel. Always manual override.
Strip only. Cut to fit. Material cost only.
Same but no toekick applied.
Strip only. Material cost only.
Strip only. Material cost only.
Edgebanded shelf. No box. Material + edge labor.
Placeholder for countertop sub. Dimensions → SF → cost.
Mounted cleat with hardware. Simple labor.
Anything not matching above. Manual line item required.
